example_1_en: A circumferential reference ring is installed along the inner wall.
example_1_zh: 環向參考環安裝在內壁周圍。
example_2_en: The circumferential path reduces the return loop area.
example_2_zh: 環向路徑可降低回流迴路面積。

example_1_en: The metal layer should be continuous around the ring.
example_1_zh: 金屬層應沿著環形結構連續一圈。
example_2_en: A continuous path is better than several isolated metal strips.
example_2_zh: 連續路徑比數段孤立金屬條更好。

example_1_en: The A1 ring is open-ended at the top and bottom.
example_1_zh: A1 航電環上下兩端是開口的。
example_2_en: An open-ended structure cannot be treated as a fully enclosed shield.
example_2_zh: 開口結構不能視為完整封閉屏蔽體。

example_1_en: The reference ring should provide a low-impedance path.
example_1_zh: 參考環應提供低阻抗路徑。
example_2_en: A low-impedance connection is essential for RF return current.
example_2_zh: 低阻抗連接對 RF 回流電流很重要。

example_1_en: Use short and wide conductors to create a low-inductance path.
example_1_zh: 使用短而寬的導體建立低電感路徑。
example_2_en: A low-inductance path is more important than DC resistance at high frequency.
example_2_zh: 在高頻時，低電感路徑比 DC 電阻更重要。

example_1_en: The bonding path should avoid unwanted resonance.
example_1_zh: 搭接路徑應避免不必要的共振。
example_2_en: A long strap may resonate at certain frequencies.
example_2_zh: 很長的搭接帶可能在特定頻率產生共振。

example_1_en: Each joint should be inspected and measured.
example_1_zh: 每個接合點都應檢查與量測。
example_2_en: A loose joint can increase resistance and noise.
example_2_zh: 鬆動的接合點會增加電阻與雜訊。

example_1_en: The equipment case should be connected to the vehicle structure.
example_1_zh: 設備外殼應連接到載具結構。
example_2_en: In a non-conductive ring, the vehicle structure must be defined carefully.
example_2_zh: 在非導電航電環中，必須謹慎定義載具結構參考。

example_1_en: Each structural element should be part of the controlled reference network.
example_1_zh: 每個結構元件都應納入受控參考網路。
example_2_en: An isolated structural element may become a noise source.
example_2_zh: 孤立的結構元件可能變成雜訊源。

example_1_en: The A1 and A4 reference rings should be interconnected.
example_1_zh: A1 與 A4 的參考環應互相連接。
example_2_en: Interconnected metal paths reduce potential differences.
example_2_zh: 互連的金屬路徑可降低電位差。

example_1_en: The bonding network should have uniform low impedance.
example_1_zh: 搭接網路應具有均勻的低阻抗。
example_2_en: A uniform reference helps reduce unexpected current paths.
example_2_zh: 一致的參考面有助於降低非預期電流路徑。

chinese_meaning: 專用回流線；專用回流路徑
example_1_en: The 28 V supply should use a dedicated return conductor.
example_1_zh: 28 V 電源應使用專用回流導體。
example_2_en: A dedicated return keeps load current out of the reference ring.
example_2_zh: 專用回流可避免負載電流流入參考環。

example_1_en: A metal cable tray can serve as the bonding backbone.
example_1_zh: 金屬線槽可作為搭接主幹。
example_2_en: The backbone should follow the main cable route.
example_2_zh: 主幹路徑應沿著主要電纜路徑配置。

example_1_en: A metal cable tray can provide a controlled return path.
example_1_zh: 金屬電纜托盤可提供受控回流路徑。
example_2_en: The cable tray should be connected to both reference rings.
example_2_zh: 電纜托盤應連接到兩個參考環。

example_1_en: A metal conduit can improve shielding along the cable route.
example_1_zh: 金屬導管可改善電纜路徑上的屏蔽效果。
example_2_en: The conduit must be electrically connected at both ends.
example_2_zh: 導管兩端必須做電氣連接。

example_1_en: Multiple parallel paths reduce the impedance between A1 and A4.
example_1_zh: 多條並聯路徑可降低 A1 與 A4 之間的阻抗。
example_2_en: A single path is less robust than several parallel paths.
example_2_zh: 單一路徑不如多條並聯路徑可靠。

example_1_en: The shield should terminate to the local chassis.
example_1_zh: 屏蔽層應端接到局部機殼。
example_2_en: Local chassis bonding reduces cable shield current loops.
example_2_zh: 局部機殼搭接可降低電纜屏蔽層電流迴路。

example_1_en: Fault protection prevents overheating during a short circuit.
example_1_zh: 故障保護可避免短路時過熱。
example_2_en: Bonding for fault protection is different from RF bonding.
example_2_zh: 故障保護用搭接與 RF 搭接不同。

example_1_en: The path should survive the specified overload current.
example_1_zh: 該路徑應能承受規定的過載電流。
example_2_en: Overload current may heat a narrow conductor quickly.
example_2_zh: 過載電流可能快速加熱狹窄導體。

example_1_en: The current-carrying capability of the bonding path must be verified.
example_1_zh: 必須驗證搭接路徑的載流能力。
example_2_en: A wide conductor has better current-carrying capability.
example_2_zh: 較寬的導體具有較好的載流能力。

example_1_en: The cable and reference path should form a small return loop.
example_1_zh: 電纜與參考路徑應形成小的回流迴路。
example_2_en: A large return loop can radiate more noise.
example_2_zh: 大型回流迴路可能輻射更多雜訊。

example_1_en: Reducing loop area lowers magnetic coupling.
example_1_zh: 降低迴路面積可減少磁場耦合。
example_2_en: Keep the bonding path close to the harness to minimize loop area.
example_2_zh: 讓搭接路徑靠近線束，以最小化迴路面積。

example_1_en: The shield termination strategy depends on the signal type.
example_1_zh: 屏蔽端接策略取決於訊號類型。
example_2_en: A clear termination strategy is required before harness design.
example_2_zh: 線束設計前需要明確的端接策略。

example_1_en: A1 and A4 need a controlled interconnection between reference rings.
example_1_zh: A1 與 A4 的參考環之間需要受控互連。
example_2_en: Controlled interconnection prevents accidental current paths.
example_2_zh: 受控互連可避免非預期電流路徑。

example_1_en: Measure the end-to-end resistance from the A1 ring to the A4 ring.
example_1_zh: 量測 A1 參考環到 A4 參考環的端到端電阻。
example_2_en: End-to-end resistance is different from single-joint resistance.
example_2_zh: 端到端電阻不同於單一接合點電阻。

example_1_en: DC resistance alone does not prove good RF performance.
example_1_zh: 僅有直流電阻無法證明良好的 RF 性能。
example_2_en: Use a four-wire meter for low DC resistance measurements.
example_2_zh: 使用四線式電表量測低直流電阻。

example_1_en: Surface conductivity must be verified on the coated composite panel.
example_1_zh: 必須驗證塗層複材板的表面導電性。
example_2_en: Poor surface conductivity can create local charge buildup.
example_2_zh: 表面導電性不佳會造成局部電荷累積。

example_1_en: The conductive coating must not be left floating.
example_1_zh: 導電塗層不能處於浮接狀態。
example_2_en: Conductive coating can help control static charge on a composite surface.
example_2_zh: 導電塗層可協助控制複材表面的靜電荷。

example_1_en: A floating conductor can behave like an unintended antenna.
example_1_zh: 浮接導體可能像非預期天線一樣作用。
example_2_en: Copper pieces on the panel should not become floating conductors.
example_2_zh: 板上的銅片不應變成浮接導體。

example_1_en: An isolated metal plate may become a re-radiator.
example_1_zh: 孤立金屬板可能變成再輻射體。
example_2_en: Bonding the panel reduces the chance of re-radiation.
example_2_zh: 將板件搭接可降低再輻射的機會。

example_1_en: The metallized layer should connect to the reference ring.
example_1_zh: 金屬化層應連接到參考環。
example_2_en: A metallized layer can improve shielding if it is properly terminated.
example_2_zh: 若端接正確，金屬化層可改善屏蔽效果。

chinese_meaning: 徑向匯流路徑；徑向母線
example_1_en: A radial bus connects the center hub to the reference ring.
example_1_zh: 徑向母線將中心集線點連到參考環。
example_2_en: Three radial buses can match the 120-degree panel layout.
example_2_zh: 三條徑向母線可配合 120 度的板件配置。

example_1_en: The chassis reference should be defined before cable routing.
example_1_zh: 在電纜佈線前應先定義機殼參考點。
example_2_en: A stable chassis reference improves EMI repeatability.
example_2_zh: 穩定的機殼參考可改善 EMI 測試重複性。

example_1_en: Lightning indirect effects can couple into long cables.
example_1_zh: 雷擊間接效應可能耦合到長電纜中。
example_2_en: Reference rings help control some lightning indirect effects, but they are not enough alone.
example_2_zh: 參考環有助於控制部分雷擊間接效應，但單靠它們並不足夠。
